heading: I build things, manage content, and get work done.
paragraphs: Founder of ERO | VISUALS. An independent content operation grown from zero to 124M+ cumulative views across TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram, handling everything from content calendars to client coordination.
Delivered commissioned edits for international clients, including a promotional edit for U.S. recording artist Gracie Abrams that reached 3.9M views and 270K likes natively.

Full-stack web developer with hands-on experience in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, and MySQL. Shipped real projects including a REST API backend and a Document Tracking System for a city government.
Available for remote work as a Web Developer, Video Editor, or Virtual Assistant. Reliable across US, UK, AU, and Asia time zones.
